title: AnomalyCraft
description: Inspired by the SCP universe, this plugin adds a multitude of anomalies for players to discover and study.
body:
# What is AnomalyCraft?
Welcome, Researcher. My name is Ketoshi, and like many of you, I've always been fascinated by the mysterious and unsettling worlds of the SCP Foundation and the Backrooms. I wanted to bring that thrilling sense of the unknown into Minecraft. After a long journey of trial and error, AnomalyCraft was born.

This plugin is designed to immerse you and your players in a world of mystery. It currently introduces 25+ unique anomalies to your server, each with a different level of danger and influence. They can appear completely at random, forcing players to adapt, or be summoned through the study of strange artifacts.

# Key Features
- 📖 The Book of Anomalies: This is your primary tool. Document a newly found anomaly by interacting with it while holding the book (or simply by having it in your inventory for some events). Your findings are recorded, providing valuable insights and lore that can be read by right-clicking the book.
- 🏆 Become a Pioneer: The first player to successfully document an anomaly will be forever recorded as its 'First Discoverer,' visible to everyone on the server. Race against others to make your mark!
- 💀 25+ Unique Anomalies: Encounter everything from dangerous, boss-like entities and strange creatures to reality-bending world events that will challenge even the most seasoned players.
- 🤫 True Discovery: To enhance the feeling of exploration and mystery, there is no public wiki detailing every anomaly. All knowledge must be gained in-game through observation and documentation. What you discover is between you and the anomaly.

# A Note from the Developer
This plugin was originally created for my personal use, so it currently has limited configuration options. This may change in the future based on community feedback! Additionally, the plugin does not include a custom resource pack, as it utilizes textures from open-access sources, and I am unsure about the permissions for redistributing them in a pack.

In any case, I hope you enjoy the game!

# ⚠️ Dependencies
IMPORTANT: This plugin requires Citizens to be installed and running on your server for all features to work correctly.
